_comment: This file is generated. Please edit .homeycompose/app.json instead.

description.en: Control your Tuya Zigbee devices locally without cloud! 111 drivers, 42,500+ device fingerprints, 1,457 flow cards. Switches, sensors, lights, thermostats, covers, locks & more. 100% local, hybrid Tuya DP + ZCL.
description.nl: Bedien je Tuya Zigbee apparaten lokaal zonder cloud! 111 drivers, 42.500+ apparaatvingerafdrukken, 1.457 flowkaarten. Schakelaars, sensoren, lampen, thermostaten, rolluiken, sloten en meer. 100% lokaal.
description.de: Steuern Sie Ihre Tuya Zigbee-Geräte lokal ohne Cloud! 111 Treiber, 42.500+ Geräte-Fingerprints, 1.457 Flow-Karten. Schalter, Sensoren, Lampen, Thermostate, Rollläden, Schlösser und mehr. 100% lokal.
description.fr: Contrôlez vos appareils Tuya Zigbee localement sans cloud ! 111 drivers, 42 500+ empreintes d'appareils, 1 457 cartes de flux. Interrupteurs, capteurs, lumières, thermostats, volets, serrures et plus. 100% local.
